prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the dark mode software interface style from image 2 to the Snipping Tool window. Change window colors, button styles, and text appearance to match the dark, modern look of image 2.
prompt_refined: Edit `image 1`: Apply the dark, modern software interface style from `image 2` to the 'Snipping Tool' window located centrally on the desktop. Change the Snipping Tool window's background to a dark grey/black, matching the primary background color of `image 2`. Redesign all buttons ('New', 'Mode', 'Delay', 'Cancel', 'Options') within the Snipping Tool window to reflect the minimalist, subtly rounded, and slightly elevated appearance of UI elements in `image 2`. Update all text within the window to white or light grey for high contrast, consistent with the text styling in `image 2`. Ensure the currently highlighted 'New' button's active state adapts visually to this dark theme, similar to highlighted selections in `image 2`.
objects: Dark grey/black internal background of the Snipping Tool window
White or light grey text within the Snipping Tool window
Snipping Tool window title bar (with dark, modern style)
